title: Recruits Claim Config
description: Adds an option to increase claim chunk limit over 50 or make it infinite in recruits mod.
body:
You can support me through- https://ko-fi.com/knightmare61825

In your saves/world/serverconfig/recruits_claim_limits-server.toml change the claimchunklimit to whatever you want.
Ex- Making it 100 will increase per chunk claim limit to 100
_**Make it 0 to turn on unlimited claims.**_


**IMP- EVEN THOUGH IT WILL SHOW  1/50 AFTER INCREASING, IT WILL NEVERTHELESS WORK FINE**

"Other options are a work in progress"

You can support me through- https://ko-fi.com/knightmare61825
